original:
说话人03(00:43:25): You understand.

哲学家(00:43:27): Sometimes people feel guilty about something, but they're not guilty when you look at it.And no, you shouldn't feel guilty.I don't know there was an accident in the industry.Say I feel guilty, but you couldn't do anything.So I said that don't guilty on the reverse.
translation:
说话人03(00:43:25): 你明白的。

哲学家(00:43:27): 有时人们会为某些事感到内疚，但细究起来他们其实并无过错。不，你不该感到内疚。比如行业里发生意外事故，有人会说“我感到内疚”，可你当时根本无能为力。所以我说，反过来想——不必内疚。
